name: SHELTER FRAME TENT
description: Professional-grade frame tent designed for extended van camping. Easy setup with aluminum frame and waterproof materials.

name: DOME TENT
description: Lightweight dome tent perfect for van life adventures. Compact storage and rapid deployment system.

name: SPRINTER VAN SETUP
description: Complete interior setup package for Mercedes Sprinter vans. Includes kitchen, storage, and sleeping solutions.

name: ROOFTOP AWNING
description: Retractable rooftop awning for instant shade and weather protection. Fits all Sprinter van models.

name: SOLAR POWER SYSTEM
description: Complete 400W solar power system with battery bank. Perfect for off-grid van camping adventures.

name: CAMP KITCHEN MODULE
description: Modular camp kitchen with induction cooktop, sink, and storage. Designed for van life cooking.

name: WATER SYSTEM KIT
description: Complete freshwater and greywater system for van conversions. Includes pump, tank, and filtration.

name: COMPOSTING TOILET
description: Eco-friendly composting toilet system. Waterless operation with odor control for van life.
